parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest difference is sequencing integrity: one text preserves setup, development, application, and closure, while the other dislocates those units, severing transitions and turning readable passages into an unusable chapter.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Recap bullets appear first, conclusions precede their premises, headings arrive after related material, and the chapter finishes with its own title and opening thought. Individual sentences remain intelligible, but their ordering destroys sustained progression.
paraphrased_evidence.B: A concrete animal vignette expands into a thesis, historical context, health stakes, a practical exercise, and a perceptual illustration. The rhetoric becomes repetitive and overinsistent, but the sections mostly build upon one another before a functional recap.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Recap bullets appear first, conclusions precede their premises, headings arrive after related material, and the chapter finishes with its own title and opening thought. Individual sentences remain intelligible, but their ordering destroys sustained progression.
